name: compliance fetch: /audit-pack flags attestations whose license_expiry has passed (operator must renew or stop citing)
command:
mkdir -p compliance/attestations && printf "framework: iso-27001-a14
license_holder: X
license_expiry: 2020-01-01
" > compliance/attestations/iso-27001-a14.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --section attestations --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --now 2026-05-13 && grep -E "iso-27001-a14.*expired" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
